title: Repeat's Transmutation
description: A datapack for any level of experience that adds slightly simpler methods for getting items!
body:
Repeat's Transmutation is a datapack for 1.18.2 and 1.20-1.20.2 that adds a simple and easy-to-learn way to get your resources and building materials without the need for extensive traveling or using extremely technical game mechanics each time you run out of them!

Designed with multiplayer in mind, so that you and your friends can play together, even if you all have varied levels of experience!

It only adds one crafting station, the Transmuter, made from only 4 Iron Blocks, 4 Coal Blocks, a Barrel, and an Armor Stand. It has 3 modes, Increasing, Transmuting, and Decreasing, which are changed by putting a piece of paper in one of the 3 leftmost slots of your barrel. 

You can easily look up all of the recipes on the wiki at tiny.cc/RepeatsTransmutation, and there's even a few tips for Minecraft beginners as to how to access some of the more advanced recipes!

With that, enjoy the datapack!

(Also, please use the External Resources for feature requests and bug/dupe reports!)
